message:
Command `
echo "=== DRT progress check: $(date) ==="
tail -20 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/drt_resume.log

echo ""
echo "=== Step 70 contents ==="
ls -lh "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/70-openroad-detailedrouting/"

echo ""
echo "=== OpenROAD process status ==="
ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2, "CPU:"$3"%", "MEM:"$4"%", "VSZ:"$5/1024"MB", "RSS:"$6/1024"MB"}'
` executed with exit code 0.

message.content: DRT is running actively — OpenROAD is consuming ~383% CPU and 1.1 GB RAM processing pin access and unique inst patterns. Now monitoring progress at intervals.
